text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is defeated at the Arima Kinen, yet
Hishi Amazon can't come to terms with her own
victory, having overcome what she long viewed as
an insurmountable wall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian bluntly tells her to accept the results.
She adds that she isn't the type to lose once and
just give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new year brings the start of her senior year,
and our next goal—the Hanshin Daishoten.
